title: Tangled in Scrapyard
description: *Captain Trashbeard stumbles in* "Oh! Fancy seeing you there..." she speaks, while all tangled up in cords, which unfortunately, are directly inside your minecraft client.
body:
Captain Trashbeard Stirs "Agh! Those darn cords have me tangled up in circles." Unfortunately, to her dismay, Captain Trashbeard fumbles around and manages to swap her keybind for Sneak to Attack/Destroy. "Oo-ooops!".

This mod has a potion effect that randomly swaps keybinds (all Captain Trashbeard's fault) when you drink a potion of entanglement.

Or... maybe you want to mess with your friends? You can brew splash potions too!

INGREDIENTS:
1x Awkward Potion,
1x Tripwire Hook
